description: Composition Black jersey made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, full sleeves with ribbed cuffs, a ribbed hem and graphic print on the front Fitting Comfort Wash care Machine wash in warm water with similar colours Do not dry clean Use a non-chlorine bleach if needed Do not iron on print Timeless and classic like the beatles, this bioworld jersey celebrates the the 60's rock legends with its distressed beatles print on the front. Flaunt your taste in music and fashion with this vintage jersey. Wear it with distressed jeans to pull off a retro chic Beatles-style. Model statistics The model wears size M in jerseys Height: 6', Shoulders: 18
